source.frequencyBasis: Learner-focused ordering of 100 common Spanish verbs, seeded from Spanish lemma frequency resources.
source.conjugationBasis: Present indicative regular endings plus explicit overrides for common irregular and stem-changing verbs.

items.source: Seeded from a learner-focused common Spanish verb frequency order. Present indicative forms are checked against regular Spanish conjugation rules and explicit common-irregular overrides.
